name: gtm-enrichment-smart
description: Multi-provider waterfall lead enrichment, routed via the SELAT Router (MPP) with one direct Circle x402 step. Takes an email (+ optional name) and returns person + company data by cross-referencing cheap routed APIs first (Apollo, Hunter, Abstract Company Enrichment via Locus), with buying-signal and AIsa Twitter social-proof gap-fills.

email.description: The lead's email address, e.g. jane@acme.com. Used by the people-enrichment, combined-enrichment, email-verifier, and email-enrichment steps.

domain.description: Company domain extracted from the email (e.g. acme.com). Used by the Abstract Company Enrichment lookup, Apollo org-enrichment, and Hunter company-enrichment steps.

organizationId.description: Apollo organization id captured from the people-enrichment step; required for the Apollo job-postings buying-signal step.

twitterHandle.description: Twitter/X handle discovered in enrichment data; used by the AIsa Twitter user-info social-proof step (sent as the userName query param).

steps.label: person enrich — Apollo people-enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
person + company combined — Hunter combined-enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
email deliverability — Hunter email-verifier (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
company brand — Abstract Company Enrichment lookup (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; skip for free email)
company gap-fill — Apollo org-enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; only if funding missing)
person tie-breaker — Hunter email-enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; only if sources conflict)
company fallback — Hunter company-enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; only if major gaps + >500 employees)
social proof — AIsa Twitter user-info API (Circle x402 catalog; DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched; only if Twitter handle found)
